TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Mami ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 99 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 87% kyan ku 86 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 13% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 83%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mami hya' ga rgyax krahu', tay 'zil na Mami hya' ga rgyax krahu', tay mkyahu' na Mami hya' ga llyung, tay mkraya' na Mami hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Mami hya' ga Batul. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč mami …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu nańßuj …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na mami ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē, taj Ēzil na mami ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē, taj mkjańßu Ē na mami ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč, taj mkraja Ē na mami ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na mami ńßja Ē …£a ő≤atul. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Mami ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 99 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 87% kyan ku 86 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 13% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 83%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mami hya' ga rgyax krahu', tay 'zil na Mami hya' ga rgyax krahu', tay mkyahu' na Mami hya' ga llyung, tay mkraya' na Mami hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Mami hya' ga Batul. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč mami …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu nańßuj …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na mami ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē, taj Ēzil na mami ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē, taj mkjańßu Ē na mami ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč, taj mkraja Ē na mami ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na mami ńßja Ē …£a ő≤atul. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
